name: Grasping Tree
description:
You rig tree branches, thin strands of bark, or other plant matter to close in on a creature that enters the snare's square. The first creature to enter the square must attempt a saving throw.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes ] damage.

Failure As success, plus the target is .

Critical Failure The target takes ] damage and is until it destroys the snare (AC 16, HP 25) or [[/act escape show-dc=all dc=19]]{Escapes}.
